query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.projectState, p.location, p.priority, p.actionTier, p.productLane,
  p.sector, p.owner, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS sendReadyCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0 AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.priority = 'hot'
  AND (
    p.projectState = 'WA'
    OR (p.projectState IS NULL AND (
      p.location LIKE '%western australia%' OR p.location LIKE '%, WA%' OR p.location LIKE '%WA,%'
      OR p.location LIKE '%perth%' OR p.location LIKE '%pilbara%' OR p.location LIKE '%kalgoorlie%'
      OR p.location LIKE '%karratha%' OR p.location LIKE '%port hedland%' OR p.location LIKE '%newman%'
      OR p.location LIKE '%geraldton%' OR p.location LIKE '%bunbury%' OR p.location LIKE '%broome%'
      OR p.location LIKE '%kwinana%' OR p.location LIKE '%murchison%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;

  AND (

    OR (p.projectState IS NULL AND (

      OR p.location LIKE '%perth%' OR p.location LIKE '%pilbara%' OR p.location LIKE '%kalgoorlie%'

      OR p.location LIKE '%geraldton%' OR p.location LIKE '%bunbury%' OR p.location LIKE '%broome%'
      OR p.location LIKE '%kwinana%' OR p.location LIKE '%murchison%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY sendReadyCount DESC, p.value DESC
LIMIT 10;
